issues.title: Unsupported Qdrant value type when using Qdrant with VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor
issues.body:
Starting with RC1, I get the following when using OpenAI, `VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor` and a Qdrant vector store:

```
java.lang.RuntimeException: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Unsupported Qdrant value type: class java.util.ArrayList
	at org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.qdrant.QdrantVectorStore.toPayload(QdrantVectorStore.java:304) ~[spring-ai-qdrant-store-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	at org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.qdrant.QdrantVectorStore.lambda$doAdd$0(QdrantVectorStore.java:186) ~[spring-ai-qdrant-store-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$3$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:212) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.AbstractList$RandomAccessSpliterator.forEachRemaining(AbstractList.java:722) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.copyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:556) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.wrapAndCopyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:546) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.evaluate(AbstractPipeline.java:622) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.evaluateToArrayNode(AbstractPipeline.java:291) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline.toArray(ReferencePipeline.java:631) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline.toArray(ReferencePipeline.java:637) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline.toList(ReferencePipeline.java:642) ~[na:na]
	at org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.qdrant.QdrantVectorStore.doAdd(QdrantVectorStore.java:188) ~[spring-ai-qdrant-store-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	at org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.observation.AbstractObservationVectorStore.lambda$add$1(AbstractObservationVectorStore.java:85) ~[spring-ai-vector-store-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	at io.micrometer.observation.Observation.observe(Observation.java:498) ~[micrometer-observation-1.14.6.jar:1.14.6]
	at org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.observation.AbstractObservationVectorStore.add(AbstractObservationVectorStore.java:85) ~[spring-ai-vector-store-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	at org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.VectorStore.accept(VectorStore.java:56) ~[spring-ai-vector-store-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	at org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.VectorStore.accept(VectorStore.java:41) ~[spring-ai-vector-store-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	at org.springframework.ai.document.DocumentWriter.write(DocumentWriter.java:30) ~[spring-ai-commons-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	at org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.vectorstore.VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor.after(VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor.java:165) ~[spring-ai-advisors-vector-store-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	at org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api.BaseAdvisor.adviseCall(BaseAdvisor.java:53) ~[spring-ai-client-chat-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	at org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.DefaultAroundAdvisorChain.lambda$nextCall$1(DefaultAroundAdvisorChain.java:110) ~[spring-ai-client-chat-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	at io.micrometer.observation.Observation.observe(Observation.java:564) ~[micrometer-observation-1.14.6.jar:1.14.6]
	at org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.DefaultAroundAdvisorChain.nextCall(DefaultAroundAdvisorChain.java:110) ~[spring-ai-client-chat-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	at org.springframework.ai.chat.client.DefaultChatClient$DefaultCallResponseSpec.lambda$doGetObservableChatClientResponse$1(DefaultChatClient.java:467) ~[spring-ai-client-chat-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	at io.micrometer.observation.Observation.observe(Observation.java:564) ~[micrometer-observation-1.14.6.jar:1.14.6]
	at org.springframework.ai.chat.client.DefaultChatClient$DefaultCallResponseSpec.doGetObservableChatClientResponse(DefaultChatClient.java:465) ~[spring-ai-client-chat-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	at org.springframework.ai.chat.client.DefaultChatClient$DefaultCallResponseSpec.doGetObservableChatClientResponse(DefaultChatClient.java:446) ~[spring-ai-client-chat-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	at org.springframework.ai.chat.client.DefaultChatClient$DefaultCallResponseSpec.content(DefaultChatClient.java:441) ~[spring-ai-client-chat-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	at com.broadcom.tanzu.ragqdrant.RagQdrantApplication.lambda$go$0(RagQdrantApplication.java:58) ~[classes/:na]
	at org.springframework.boot.SpringApplication.lambda$callRunner$4(SpringApplication.java:785) ~[spring-boot-3.4.5.jar:3.4.5]
	at org.springframework.util.function.ThrowingConsumer$1.acceptWithException(ThrowingConsumer.java:82) ~[spring-core-6.2.6.jar:6.2.6]
	at org.springframework.util.function.ThrowingConsumer.accept(ThrowingConsumer.java:60) ~[spring-core-6.2.6.jar:6.2.6]
	at org.springframework.util.function.ThrowingConsumer$1.accept(ThrowingConsumer.java:86) ~[spring-core-6.2.6.jar:6.2.6]
	at org.springframework.boot.SpringApplication.callRunner(SpringApplication.java:797) ~[spring-boot-3.4.5.jar:3.4.5]
	at org.springframework.boot.SpringApplication.callRunner(SpringApplication.java:785) ~[spring-boot-3.4.5.jar:3.4.5]
	at org.springframework.boot.SpringApplication.lambda$callRunners$3(SpringApplication.java:773) ~[spring-boot-3.4.5.jar:3.4.5]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp$OfRef.accept(ForEachOps.java:184) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.SortedOps$SizedRefSortingSink.end(SortedOps.java:357) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.copyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:557) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.wrapAndCopyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:546) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp.evaluateSequential(ForEachOps.java:151) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp$OfRef.evaluateSequential(ForEachOps.java:174) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.evaluate(AbstractPipeline.java:265) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline.forEach(ReferencePipeline.java:611) ~[na:na]
	at org.springframework.boot.SpringApplication.callRunners(SpringApplication.java:773) ~[spring-boot-3.4.5.jar:3.4.5]
	at org.springframework.boot.SpringApplication.run(SpringApplication.java:325) ~[spring-boot-3.4.5.jar:3.4.5]
	at org.springframework.boot.SpringApplication.run(SpringApplication.java:1362) ~[spring-boot-3.4.5.jar:3.4.5]
	at org.springframework.boot.SpringApplication.run(SpringApplication.java:1351) ~[spring-boot-3.4.5.jar:3.4.5]
	at com.broadcom.tanzu.ragqdrant.RagQdrantApplication.main(RagQdrantApplication.java:23) ~[classes/:na]
Caused by: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Unsupported Qdrant value type: class java.util.ArrayList
	at org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.qdrant.QdrantValueFactory.value(QdrantValueFactory.java:80) ~[spring-ai-qdrant-store-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	at org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.qdrant.QdrantValueFactory.lambda$toValueMap$1(QdrantValueFactory.java:45) ~[spring-ai-qdrant-store-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.Collectors.lambda$uniqKeysMapAccumulator$1(Collectors.java:180) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.ReduceOps$3ReducingSink.accept(ReduceOps.java:169) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.HashMap$EntrySpliterator.forEachRemaining(HashMap.java:1858) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.copyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:556) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.wrapAndCopyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:546) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.ReduceOps$ReduceOp.evaluateSequential(ReduceOps.java:921) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.evaluate(AbstractPipeline.java:265) ~[na:na]
	at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline.collect(ReferencePipeline.java:702) ~[na:na]
	at org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.qdrant.QdrantValueFactory.toValueMap(QdrantValueFactory.java:45) ~[spring-ai-qdrant-store-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	at org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.qdrant.QdrantVectorStore.toPayload(QdrantVectorStore.java:299) ~[spring-ai-qdrant-store-1.0.0-RC1.jar:1.0.0-RC1]
	... 48 common frames omitted
```

This appears to have been introduced with https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/commit/6c9b4d6cd49d173bd3b806c98c1afff2b4ff76e1. 

The following code snippet reproduces it:

```
var chatClient = chatClientBuilder
        .defaultAdvisors(
                VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor.builder(vectorStore).build())
        .build();
var answer = chatClient.prompt()
        .user("How many can play the game?")
        .call()
        .content();
System.err.println(answer);
```

comments.body:
Side note: I tried switching to Chroma just to see if Chroma would exhibit the same (or similar) problem. It does have issues with Chroma, but at least on the surface, it doesn't seem to be the same problem. With Chroma it has an issue when upserting the message into the vector DB and I get a 422 from Chroma's API:

```
422 Unprocessable Entity: "{"error":"ChromaError","message":"Failed to deserialize the JSON body into the target type: metadatas[0].annotations: data did not match any variant of untagged enum UpdateMetadataValue at line 1 column 19627"}"
```

Same code snippet as above, just Chroma instead of Qdrant.
